footer.projectInfo: G.E.A.R.S. - Green Explorers: Adults Reimagining Sustainability

hero.title: Green Explorers
hero.subtitle: Adults Reimagining Sustainability
hero.description: 10 interactive modules on sustainable living, zero waste, and green competences. Learn at your own pace, earn your certificate.

modules.title: 10 Interactive Modules
modules.description: Comprehensive lessons on sustainable living, from waste management to community action.

quizzes.title: Quizzes & Activities
quizzes.description: Test your knowledge with interactive quizzes, drag-and-drop exercises, and real-world scenarios.

certificate.title: Certificate of Completion
certificate.description: Earn a recognised certificate after completing all modules and demonstrating your competences.

modulesPreview.title: Learning Modules
modulesPreview.subtitle: 10 modules covering all aspects of sustainable living

greencomp.title: GreenComp Framework
greencomp.subtitle: Our curriculum is aligned with the European Sustainability Competence Framework

catalog.title: Learning Modules
catalog.subtitle: Explore all 10 modules of the G.E.A.R.S. programme

1.title: Introduction to 5R Principles
1.description: Learn the foundation of sustainable living through the 5R hierarchy: Refuse, Reduce, Reuse, Repurpose, Recycle.

2.title: Waste Segregation & Zero Waste
2.description: Master proper waste sorting and discover the zero waste philosophy for everyday life.

3.title: Composting & Organic Waste
3.description: Turn organic waste into valuable compost and understand the nutrient cycle.

4.title: Sustainable Shopping
4.description: Make informed purchasing decisions considering environmental and social impacts.

5.title: Circular Economy
5.description: Understand how the circular economy model replaces the linear take-make-dispose approach.

6.title: Fast vs. Slow Fashion
6.description: Explore the environmental and social costs of fast fashion and discover sustainable alternatives.

7.title: Green Consumption & Eco-labels
7.description: Learn to read eco-labels and make truly sustainable consumer choices.

8.title: Energy Efficiency & Footprint
8.description: Calculate your ecological footprint and discover practical energy-saving strategies.

9.title: Community Action
9.description: Harness the power of collective action for environmental change in your community.

10.title: Eco-Anxiety & Wellbeing
10.description: Understand eco-anxiety and develop strategies to channel environmental concern into positive action.

embodyingValues.title: Embodying Sustainability Values
embodyingValues.description: Reflecting on personal values and how they relate to sustainability

embracingComplexity.title: Embracing Complexity
embracingComplexity.description: Understanding interconnected systems and managing uncertainty

envisioningFutures.title: Envisioning Sustainable Futures
envisioningFutures.description: Imagining better futures and developing adaptability

actingForSustainability.title: Acting for Sustainability
actingForSustainability.description: Taking individual and collective action for positive change
